problem.title: Search for a Range
problem.description: Given an array of integers nums sorted in non-decreasing order, find the starting and ending position of a given target value. If target is not found, return [-1, -1].

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Binary Search
solutions.description: Run two binary searches: the first finds the leftmost occurrence by continuing to search left after each hit, and the second finds the rightmost occurrence by continuing to search right. Each search is O(log n), so the combined solution is O(log n). The key insight is that a standard binary search can be biased left or right simply by updating the result and continuing to narrow the same half after a match.
